context: Checks whether the final artifact follows the swoosh-emails instructions from the published Elixir Phoenix Skills plugin.

checklist.name: instruction-1
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Use Swoosh for all email sending**

checklist.name: instruction-2
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Define emails in separate modules** — `MyApp.Emails.UserEmail`, not inline in contexts

checklist.name: instruction-3
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Use Phoenix components for email templates** — reuse UI components in emails

checklist.name: instruction-4
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Never send emails synchronously in web requests** — use Oban or Task for async delivery

checklist.name: instruction-5
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Use `Swoosh.Preview` in development** — preview emails in the browser

checklist.name: instruction-6
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Prefer Oban over Task.start** — retries and observability vs silent failures

checklist.name: instruction-7
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Use `Phoenix.Component` and `Phoenix.Template` to render HEEx templates as email bodies, reusing UI components:
